headline: Benchmark reboots its Datadog target as the AI super cycle builds
summary: Benchmark raised its price target on Datadog to $330 from $260 on Thursday, July 2, a Street high, while keeping its buy rating unchanged. The stock was already up more than 90% year to date before this call landed, meaning Benchmark is not calling a bottom, but arguing the rally still has room to ...
